title: Distribution of Iranian Oil Revenue Among Plan Organization, Ministry of Finance, and NIOC, 1957-1959
source_org: US Bureau of Mines Information Circular 8203 (1963), unlabeled table (p.19)
extraction_method: pdftoppm -r 150 render to PNG (PDF page 27) + Read tool visual verification.
notes: Small but precise dataset showing how Iran's oil revenue was institutionally split among the Plan Organization (7-year development plan financing), Ministry of Finance (general budget), and NIOC (operating/exploration costs) in the late 1950s -- directly quantifies the '37% of the first 7-year plan financed by oil revenue' / '73% of the second 7-year plan (1955-62) financed by oil revenue, of which $811.9 million' narrative figures also present in the source text (captured in this dataset's sibling manifest notes, not re-tabulated as they are single point figures already, not a year-series).
